title: Detection of Escherichia fergusonii in seafood samples

steps.instruction: Fig. 1 — Gene specific PCR amplification of Escherichia fergusonii (lane 1 – 100 bp DNA ladder, lane 2 – positive control (clinical E. fergusonii), lane 3 – negative control, lane 4 – E011, lane 5 – E060)
